items.name: Chunky Chips
items.description: Chicken salt, aioli. Dairy free, vegetarian. Load me up with bacon, cheese and sour cream for an extra charge.

items.name: Flame Grilled Sweet Corn Cobs
items.description: Vegetarian. Cream cheese, puffed grains.

items.name: Crispy Coated Chicken Wings
items.description: Chef's secret hot sauce, ranch, shallots.

items.name: Lemon Pepper Calamari
items.description: Dairy free. Dill mayo, pickled onion, chili salt, fennel slaw.

items.name: Tossed Wai Wai Noodles
items.description: Wai Wai noodles tossed with spices, cucumber, tomatoes, coriander, peanuts and lemon juice.

items.name: Cucumber Sticks
items.description: Wedged cucumbers tossed in house spice, sesame and lime.

items.name: Chatpate
items.description: Crispy noodle salad with cucumber, tomato, onion, smashed potatoes, green peas, puffed rice, crispy bits, spices, lemon juice. Dairy free, vegetarian.

items.name: Pani Puri
items.description: Fried and puffed doughballs stuffed with potatoes, onion and chickpeas served cold with tangy tamarind sauce.

items.name: Duck Choila
items.description: Tender marinated meat, garlic chives, shallots, chillies, tossed in spicy Szechuan pepper spice served with garden salad.

items.name: Chicken Choila
items.description: Tender marinated chicken tossed in chilli, garlic, sechuan pepper, onion and served with garden salad.

items.name: Spicy Potatoes
items.description: Spicy marinated potatoes with house made hot dipping sauce.

items.name: Buff Choila
items.description: Buffalo meat marinated and tossed in sechuan pepper, house made special sauce, ginger, garlic, chilli sauce coating served with garden salad.

items.name: Fried Sausage
items.description: Chicken sausage, chef's spice dust, house-made special chilli sauce.

items.name: Chicken Sekuwa
items.description: Marinated and grilled chicken thigh pieces served with garden salad and freshly made tomato chutney.

items.name: Lamb Sekuwa
items.description: Marinated and grilled lamb pieces served with garden salad and mint yoghurt.

items.name: Pork Belly Sekuwa
items.description: Pork belly marinated and grilled till tender, served with garden salad and freshly made tomato chutney.

items.name: Chow Mein
items.description: House-made stir-fried noodles with capsicum, shallots, cabbage, onion, soy sauce, garlic chives, chickpeas.

items.name: Momo
items.description: Your choice of protein filled Nepalese pastry cooked to your liking - steamed, deep-fried or pan-fried, with peanut, coriander and tomato chutney and house special hot sauce.

items.name: Thali
items.description: Classic Nepalese dinner set with a choice of curry, veg curry, housemade pickle, wilted spinach (mustard greens), black lentil soup, rice, yoghurt, tomato chutney, papadum, carrot and cucumber.

items.name: Rasmalai (each)
items.description: Coconut and nut flavoured sweet delicacy with condensed milk sauce.

items.name: Gulab Jamun (each)
items.description: Sweet cardamom flavoured balls dipped in sugar syrup.
